Contributors: devuser
Tags: tools
Requires at least: 6.0

Stable tag: 1.0.0

Tests that section name aliases resolve correctly.

== Description ==

A plugin that tests section aliases.

== Frequently Asked Questions ==

= Is this a test? =

Yes, absolutely.
